runtime_rule: Generated scenes should use one registered 1920x1080 background preset as the primary visual layer. New Folk Frequency pages render all text in HTML/CSS; background images must contain no intended readable text. Fonts and backgrounds are theme-level assets, not per-article outputs.

assets.source: /Users/langjun/.codex/generated_images/019e03a9-0e83-7df1-9ae6-b606d9f43407/ig_0d5739b9cf8fb8400169ff8c84f95c819b9d6c079881ee3329.png
assets.role: Warm cream paper grain background texture for all Folk Frequency scenes.
assets.usage: Use as a subtle multiply overlay or base paper texture. Keep opacity low under dense text.
assets.avoid: Do not use as a standalone hero image or crop into noisy high-contrast blocks.

assets.source: /Users/langjun/.codex/generated_images/019e03a9-0e83-7df1-9ae6-b606d9f43407/ig_0d5739b9cf8fb8400169ff8cb7f22c819b93393df899b76d4e.png
assets.role: Sparse ink fleck and letterpress wear overlay for cards, borders, and poster panels.
assets.usage: Use with multiply blend at 0.08-0.22 opacity.
assets.avoid: Do not apply above body copy at high opacity.

assets.source: /Users/langjun/.codex/generated_images/019e03a9-0e83-7df1-9ae6-b606d9f43407/ig_0d5739b9cf8fb8400169ff8cf23c00819ba2b30dee58f0dfe1.png
assets.role: Reference ornament sheet with bird, sun, flower, leaf, star, heart, hand, scallop, zigzag, and floral corner motifs.
assets.usage: Reference-only style sheet. Use registered SVG icons and borders for runtime HTML.
assets.avoid: Do not tile this entire image as a background or place it directly in a scene.

assets.source: Cropped from references/folk-ornament-sheet.png with alpha matte extraction.
assets.role: Transparent Image 2 folk bird ornament for hooks and cultural scenes.
assets.usage: Optional accent only. Use no more than 1-2 per scene, and never as the main border system.
assets.avoid: Do not use to rebuild full-page borders or dense repeated patterns; the background preset already owns the main folk composition.

assets.source: /Users/langjun/.codex/generated_images/019e03a9-0e83-7df1-9ae6-b606d9f43407/ig_08dcff39dcc52ec6016a0373dd69b881958834de604e50ad87.png
assets.role: Clean folk border background for hook and warm story scenes; contains paper, outer border, corner flowers, edge ornaments, and no fixed layout slots.
assets.usage: Use through the matching .ff-bg-* background preset. Render all cards, titles, badges, image frames, and controls in HTML/CSS inside the safe area.
assets.avoid: Do not add readable text, fixed cards, panels, title slots, hero-art frames, metric slots, step cards, arrows, or blank layout boxes into the background image.
